title: Civil Aviation: Subsidiary Legislation: En Route Navigation Charges Regulations
title_en: Civil Aviation: Subsidiary Legislation: En Route Navigation Charges Regulations

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the En Route Navigation Charges Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Charge
provisions.content:
3. Charge
An aircraft flying over Botswana whether under instrument or visual flight rules, shall be charged a fee calculated in accordance with the First Schedule, payable to the Director for en route navigation services provided by the Gaborone Flight Information Region.

definitions.definition: a document entitled "Aeronautical Information Publication" in force at the date of the making of these Regulations, published and updated from time to time by the Department of Civil Aviation
those services provided for arriving or departing controlled flights, including services provided in a terminal control area
those services, except approach control services, provided to aircraft proceeding through the Gaborone Flight Information Region
an airspace of defined dimension within which flight information service and alerting service are provided
the maximum take off weight of an aircraft as stated in its certificate of airworthiness, expressed in kilograms
but is not limited to, air traffic services, aeronautical telecommunications services, meteorological services, search and rescue services and aeronautical information services.
